query:
INSERT INTO grant_opportunities (name, funderName, funderType, minAmount, maxAmount, typicalAmount, eligibleEntityTypes, eligibilityRequirements, geographicRestrictions, focusAreas, description, applicationUrl, deadline, isRecurring, recurringFrequency, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  'Amber Grant for Women',
  'WomensNet',
  'foundation',
  10000.00,
  50000.00,
  10000.00,
  '["llc", "sole_proprietor", "nonprofit"]',
  'Open to women (18 years or older) who own at least 50% of a business based in the United States or Canada. Eligible businesses include pre-revenue startups and established businesses.',
  'United States, Canada',
  '["women_owned", "small_business", "entrepreneurship"]',
  'Every month, WomensNet awards three $10,000 Amber Grants to women-owned businesses. One grant is given to a startup, one to an established business, and one to a business in a special category. All monthly winners are eligible for the $50,000 year-end grant. $15 application fee.',
  'https://ambergrantsforwomen.com/get-an-amber-grant/apply-now/',
  '2026-01-31 23:59:59',
  1,
  'monthly',
  'open',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
